infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow app to access your photos to upload venue images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow app to save images to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow app to use camera to take venue photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow app to access your location to find nearby sports venues.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Allow app to access your location to find nearby sports venues.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow app to access your photos to upload venue images.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow app to use camera to take venue photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow app to access your location to find nearby sports venues.
